note: Métro d'Alger operational facts from SEMA (metro-eldjazair.dz). Authoritative operator; the full 19-station geodata comes from Wikidata/OSM (SEMA's static pages expose only the 5 commercial-agency stations). Use SEMA for the operational count + line-status filter over the ~32 Wikidata metro nodes.

operator.name: SEMA — Société d'Exploitation du Métro d'Alger

wikidata_note: Wikidata lists ~32 Algiers metro nodes; 19 are operational. The remainder are extensions under construction / planned — El Harrach → Aéroport Houari Boumediene, Aïn Naâdja → Baraki, Place des Martyrs → Chevalley / Bab El Oued. Gives a metro line-status dimension (operational vs under-construction vs planned).
